disabled_features.reason: Cross-project management is provided by Server and is not exposed by the local Desktop delivery.
Workspace administration requires the Server organization and workspace control plane.
Time Machine is not implemented in the Desktop delivery.
Organization membership is owned by the Server control plane.
Organization-scoped resource access control is owned by Server.
Sharing requires the Server collaboration control plane.
Realtime multi-user collaboration requires Server and is not shipped as a Desktop capability.
Organization administration policy is owned by Server.
Organization audit services are owned by Server.
Entitlement, quota, and usage accounting are Server control-plane functions.
Organization lifecycle management is owned by Server.
